chapter_title.en: Chapter 171 – The one who misses the Hajj

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/139)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/139)
text: مَنْ أَدْرَكَ الْمَشْعَرَ الْحَرَامَ وَ عَلَيْهِ خَمْسَةٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَزُولَ الشَّمْسُ فَقَدْ أَدْرَكَ الْحَجَّ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ibn Fazzal, from Abdullah Bin Al Mugheira, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who arrives at the Sacred Monuments and upon it are (at least) five from the people (remaining), before the (start of the) decline of the sun, so he has accomplished the Hajj’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from ibn Faddal from ‘Abd Allah ibn al-Mughirah from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that one who attends al-Mash‘ar al-Haram when there still are five people and it is before Zawal (declining of the sun toward the west at noontime) he has attended al-Hajj. ‘“
